water.name: San Luis Rey River West Fork
aliases: West Fork San Luis Rey River

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(130) — San Luis Rey River West Fork (San Diego Co.)
sources.quotedText: (130) San Luis Rey River West Fork (San Diego Co.). All year. Only artificial lures may be used. 2 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 251349, "West Fork San Luis Rey River", Stream, CA, San Diego Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":251349,"gaz_name":"West Fork San Luis Rey River","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"San Diego"} — geometry multipoint; first point converts to lon -116.7439, lat 33.2667, near the stream's mouth/confluence with the main stem San Luis Rey River near Lake Henshaw, correcting the file's prior coordinate (-116.8200, 33.3300) which sat ~10km northwest near the stream's headwaters below Palomar Mountain and did not match the GNIS-derived point.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
